arts.ttl: This CAN be the day Celtic win away as Brendan Rodgers issues 'no doubt' Champions League prediction
arts.sum: Rodgers' side take on Dinamo Zagreb in Croatia and he's confident they can end a long wait for a European away win

arts.ttl: 'Goodness me'... Ian McCall blown away by player Celtic signed in the summer who is a complete bargain
arts.sum: Luke McCowan was brought to Celtic from Dundee for a mere £1m fee and McCall reckons that piece of transfer business is looking a ‘snip’ for Rodgers . What Tony Docherty told Ian McCall about Luke McCowan at Dundee before big Celtic move

arts.ttl: Andy Walker predicts how many points Celtic will finish ahead of Aberdeen and Rangers in the Scottish Premiership
arts.sum: Speaking before Celtic beat Hibs, former Hoops striker, Andy Walker predicted how many points Rodgers will finish ahead of Aberdeen and Rangers in the race for the title and now, it could be even more after the weekend’s results. With Aberdeen dropping further behind Celtic after drawing with St Johnstone and Rangers closing the gap on second place, it does look like the battle to finish second is starting to hot up this winter.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels receives Ref Watch treatment for Celtic vs Hibs 'stamp'
arts.sum: Arne Engels receives Ref Watch treatment for Celtic vs Hibs 'stamp'.

arts.ttl: Celtic villain of the past warns Brendan Rodgers what's coming as Dinamo camp declare 'you can't surprise us'
arts.sum: Forward Marko Pjaca was in the Zagreb team that downed the Hoops in 2014

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton issues brilliant Rangers jibe with Celtic top of the Premiership table
arts.sum: Chris Sutton says Rangers ‘just 11 points behind’ Celtic in the Premiership table “Rangers fans, big win, 3-0 away at Dingwall at Ross County, just the 11 points behind Celtic now,” said Sutton.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd makes it clear that Kasper Schmeichel is already better than Joe Hart at one thing at Celtic
arts.sum: Kris Boyd says Kasper Schmeichel is better than Joe Hart at playing out from the back at Celtic Joe Hart retired in the summer and it left a big void in between Celtic’s stick, so the next man coming in had to be right.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports host uses Arne Engels to launch Celtic enquiry as Ref Watch panel split over two flashpoints
arts.sum: The £11m Parkhead record signing was the subject of a Var check

arts.ttl: IFAB are trialling a 'very interesting' rule change Celtic's opponents will fear
arts.sum: Celtic fans will like the IFAB trial to stop time-wasting by goalkeepers Nelson told The Times, “The data that’s coming out of it so far is very, very interesting, in that the two trials so far have been that if the goalkeeper is holding on to the ball too long, the referee will award a corner.

arts.ttl: Celtic contact for player can now lead to January transfer – Loan or sale to Bhoys
arts.sum: Celtic attempted to sign Mahamadou Diawara from Lyon in the summer transfer window. The Scottish giants were said to have made an offer for the midfielder as Brendan Rodgers wanted more depth in midfield. The move didn’t go through, as Diawara stayed at Lyon.
